title: Discover the BUDGET operation contract
description: Expose human help and versioned machine-readable schemas for every Public Budget Operation. Implements G6 through UC-BUDGET-005 under C16 and C17.
rationale: The AI Agent Host must discover capability, authority, inputs, side effects, and failures without prompts or private storage knowledge.
story_want: agents to inspect every BUDGET operation before invoking it
story_so_that: delegated planning remains safe and self-documenting
acceptance_criteria: Given the self-contained Tally executable, when an agent requests top-level or BUDGET help non-interactively, then Create Draft, Get Plan Revision, List Plan Revisions, Activate Plan Revision, Get Budget Position, and Discover Contract are described without starting a daemon or mutation.

Given any Public Budget Operation, when its machine schema is requested, then BUDGET returns versioned request, result, expected error, exit, authority, mutability, idempotency, limit, and compatibility metadata.
Given a schema request for the same contract version, when it is repeated, then its semantic content and deterministic ordering are identical.

Given a requested operation is not in the public BUDGET contract, when discovery or invocation is attempted, then BUDGET returns a stable unknown-operation error and exposes no private storage or implementation detail.
Given contract discovery, when its output is inspected, then it contains schemas and safe examples but no persisted owner plan, category amount, actual, or position payload.
